titleStmt.title: SII 30.107: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 107. (A.R. No. 184 of 1915.) Tirumukkūḍal, Madhurantakam Taluk, Chingleput District Veṅkaṭēsa Perumāḷ temple-on the east wall of the same prakāra Vīra Rājēndra-Chōḻa: year 2: 1065 A.D.

summary.p: Begins with the praśasti of Vīra Rājēndrachōḻadēva. It records the gift of two twilight lamps to the temple of Tirumukkūḍal-Āḻvār by a brāhmaṇa lady named Tāntōnṟi, wife of Vārkkūra sōlai Bhuvasvasi of Marudūr in Tiruvindaḷūr-nāḍu. The charity was placed under the supervision of Kantāḍai Sri Vāsudēvakkramavittan of Parakēsarichēri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvaḷartikaḻ puyattirunilavalaiyam tanamaṇi pūṇena tāṅkiya manmaṇik koṟṟaveṇkuṭainiḻaṟ kuvalaiyattuyirkaḷai peṟṟatāyinu peṇa maṟṟuḷḷaṟaikaḻalaraiaṭi niḻalotuṅka Uṟaipilattuṭai kaliyo
tuṅka muraimayi larupalat tamaiya ṉāḷavantāṉai nirumpuvi nikaḻ rājādhirā[ja*]neṉ ṟoḷimaṇimuṭi taṉṟuṇait tampiyai taniveṟcaṉ vallapaṉaip pillaṅkalai maturāntakaṉai coḷarājentra nenṟum niḻmuṭi lāka tiyā
ṭiyoṭu Oṟapavar varukenṟu Ippor toḻilurimaiyil Etir Aracu viṟṟiru mevaru manuneṟi viḷakkiya kovirājakecari panmarāna muṭaiyār śrī vira rājentradevaṟku yāṇṭu 2- ṇṭāvatu coḻamaṇṭalat
tu vaṭakarai tiruvin=taḷurnāṭṭu marutūr brāhmaṇaṉ vārkkuracolai [bhuva]svāci brāhmaṇi tāntonṟi jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattuk kaḷattūrk koṭṭattu taniyūr śrīmadhurān=taka śaturvvetimaṅkalattu
vaṭapiṭākai tirumukkaṭalāḻvārkkuRead- tirumukkūṭalāḻvārkku san=tiviḷakku Iraṇṭukku śantrātittavaṟ celvataṟkku Āṭu 2 10 3 Ivai ḷ vacam parakecari cerik kan=tāṭai śrīvāsuteva
kkiramavittan kaṅkāṇiyāka Inniman=tam celuttak kaṭavārkaḷākavum ..
Digital edition of SII 30.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
